title: Color Theme - Switching theme while Phone is set to Light Theme
scenario: Color Theme switching does not immediately apply across all app screens or persist after app restart on Poly Studio Mobile
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on a phone set to Light Mode.
2. Navigate to Home → Account → Color Theme.
3. Verify the default theme is set to 'Follow Phone Theme'.

5. Observe that the theme immediately changes to Dark across all app screens (Home, Device Settings, Audio Settings, ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, Notifications, DFU screens, Poly Lens Menu, User Guides, Onboardings).
7. Observe that the theme immediately changes to Light across all app screens.
9. Observe that the theme reverts to Light (matching the phone's Light Mode) across all app screens.
10. Close and reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app.
11. Navigate to Home → Account → Color Theme and verify the selected theme persists (e.g., if Dark Theme was last selected, it remains Dark).
12. While on the currently selected theme (e.g., Dark Theme), tap the same theme option again (Dark Theme).
13. Observe that no change occurs and the theme remains the same.
expected: The selected color theme is applied immediately across all app screens, persists after app restart, and tapping the currently selected theme does nothing. Switching from Follow Phone Theme → Dark Theme → Follow Phone Theme correctly reverts to the phone's Light Theme.
